parameters.query:
INSERT INTO followups (
  lead_id,
  followup_type,
  message_template_key,
  scheduled_for,
  status,
  metadata,
  dedupe_key,
  created_at
)
VALUES
(
  '{{ $json.execution_context.lead_id }}',
  'quote_no_reply_24h',
  'quote_no_reply_24h',
  NOW() + interval '24 hours',
  'pending',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'source', 'action_executor',
    'trigger_action', 'send_quote',
    'quote_id', '{{ $json.quote_db_id || "" }}',
    'service_interest', '{{ $json.execution_context.service_interest || "" }}',
    'vehicle_type', '{{ $json.execution_context.vehicle_type || "" }}',
    'district', '{{ $json.execution_context.district || "" }}'
  ),
  '{{ $json.execution_context.lead_id }}__quote_no_reply_24h__{{ $json.quote_db_id || "no_quote_id" }}',
  NOW()
),
(
  '{{ $json.execution_context.lead_id }}',
  'quote_no_reply_48h',
  'quote_no_reply_48h',
  NOW() + interval '48 hours',
  'pending',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'source', 'action_executor',
    'trigger_action', 'send_quote',
    'quote_id', '{{ $json.quote_db_id || "" }}',
    'service_interest', '{{ $json.execution_context.service_interest || "" }}',
    'vehicle_type', '{{ $json.execution_context.vehicle_type || "" }}',
    'district', '{{ $json.execution_context.district || "" }}'
  ),
  '{{ $json.execution_context.lead_id }}__quote_no_reply_48h__{{ $json.quote_db_id || "no_quote_id" }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (dedupe_key) DO NOTHING;

parameters.jsCode:
const s = $json.lead_state_update || {};
const leadId = $json.lead_id || $json.execution_context?.lead_id;

if (!leadId) {
  throw new Error("Missing lead_id in build_update_lead_state_query");
}

function sqlText(value) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") return "NULL";
  return `'${String(value).replace(/'/g, "''")}'`;
}

function sqlNumber(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? String(n) : "NULL";
}

function sqlBool(value) {
  if (value === true) return "true";
  if (value === false) return "false";
  if (String(value).toLowerCase() === "true") return "true";
  if (String(value).toLowerCase() === "false") return "false";
  return "NULL";
}

function sqlJsonb(value) {
  const json = JSON.stringify(Array.isArray(value) ? value : []);
  return `'${json.replace(/'/g, "''")}'::jsonb`;
}

const query = `
UPDATE public.lead_state
SET
  stage = ${sqlText(s.stage)},
  intent_last = ${sqlText(s.intent_last)},
  interest_score = ${sqlNumber(s.interest_score ?? 0)},

  service_interest = ${sqlText(s.service_interest)},

vehicle_type = ${sqlText(s.vehicle_type)},
district = ${sqlText(s.district)},

mentioned_vehicle_type = ${sqlText(s.mentioned_vehicle_type)},
confirmed_vehicle_type = ${sqlText(s.confirmed_vehicle_type)},
mentioned_district = ${sqlText(s.mentioned_district)},
confirmed_district = ${sqlText(s.confirmed_district)},

  missing_fields = ${sqlJsonb(s.missing_fields)},
  last_bot_action = ${sqlText(s.last_bot_action)},
  next_goal = ${sqlText(s.next_goal)},
  human_handoff = ${sqlBool(s.human_handoff)},

  booking_options = ${sqlJsonb(s.booking_options)},
  booking_date = ${sqlText(s.booking_date)},
  booking_time = ${sqlText(s.booking_time)},
  slot_id = ${sqlText(s.slot_id)},
  availability_confirmed = ${sqlBool(s.availability_confirmed)},

  availability_window = ${sqlText(s.availability_window)},
  availability_label = ${sqlText(s.availability_label)},
  calendar_id = ${sqlText(s.calendar_id)},
  duration_minutes = ${sqlNumber(s.duration_minutes ?? 120)},
  days_ahead = ${sqlNumber(s.days_ahead)},
  start_offset_days = ${sqlNumber(s.start_offset_days)},
  max_slots = ${sqlNumber(s.max_slots)},

   service_address = ${sqlText(s.service_address)},
  address_reference = ${sqlText(s.address_reference)},
  address_confirmed = ${sqlBool(s.address_confirmed)},
  address_confirmed_at = ${sqlText(s.address_confirmed_at)},

  cancellation_reason = ${sqlText(s.cancellation_reason)},
  reschedule_reason = ${sqlText(s.reschedule_reason)},
  last_appointment_event_id = ${sqlText(s.last_appointment_event_id)},

  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE lead_id = '${String(leadId).replace(/'/g, "''")}'::uuid
RETURNING
  lead_id,
  stage,
  intent_last,
  interest_score,
  service_interest,
  vehicle_type,
  district,
  
  mentioned_vehicle_type,
  confirmed_vehicle_type,
  mentioned_district,
  confirmed_district,
  
  missing_fields,
  last_bot_action,
  next_goal,
  human_handoff,
  booking_options,
  booking_date,
  booking_time,
  slot_id,
  availability_confirmed,
  availability_window,
  availability_label,
  calendar_id,
  duration_minutes,
  days_ahead,
  start_offset_days,
  max_slots,
 service_address,
  address_reference,
  address_confirmed,
  address_confirmed_at,
  cancellation_reason,
  reschedule_reason,
  last_appointment_event_id,
  updated_at;
`;

return [
  {
    ...$json,
    update_lead_state_query: query,
  },
];

const original = $("build_outbound_message_payload").first().json;

const messageSent =
  $json.message_sent === true ||
  $json.success === true ||
  $json.status === "sent" ||
  $json.status === "accepted" ||
  $json.provider_status === "sent" ||
  $json.provider_status === "accepted" ||
  !!$json.provider_message_id ||
  !!$json.message_id ||
  !!$json.id;
return [{
  ...original,
  ...$json,

  message_sent: messageSent,

  provider_message_id:
    $json.provider_message_id ||
    $json.message_id ||
    $json.id ||
    null,

  provider_status:
  $json.provider_status ||
  $json.status ||
  (messageSent ? "sent" : "failed")
}];

INSERT INTO followups (

 service_address,
